title: Delightfully Aerated Greek Puy-lentils Raclette Grilled Revithia
description: A unique and adventurous Greek dish that combines the creamy texture of raclette cheese with the earthy flavor of puy lentils, all wrapped up in a crispy revithia shell.

ingredients.name: Puy Lentils
ingredients.notes: French green lentils, rinsed and drained

ingredients.name: Raclette Cheese
ingredients.notes: cow milk, sliced into thin pieces

ingredients.name: Revithia Shells
ingredients.notes: Crispy fried pastry shells, store-bought or homemade

instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine puy lentils and 2 cups of water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes, or until lentils are tender.
While the lentils cook, heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a small skillet over medium heat. Add sliced raclette cheese and cook, stirring occasionally, until melted and bubbly.
Brush the revithia shells with the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil and place on the raclette grill. Cook for 2-3 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
